festivals.name: Diwali
festivals.subtitle: Festival of Lights
festivals.blurb: Rows of oil lamps line every doorway tonight. Markets glow saffron and gold; firecrackers crackle long past midnight.

festivals.name: Holi
festivals.subtitle: Festival of Colors
festivals.blurb: Plumes of colored powder rise from every courtyard. Strangers smear gulal on each other. Bhang lassis flow.

festivals.name: Vaisakhi
festivals.subtitle: Sikh New Year
festivals.blurb: Nagar kirtans wind through the streets. The Golden Temple gleams brighter than usual under fresh marigold garlands.

festivals.name: Navratri & Dussehra
festivals.subtitle: Nine nights of Durga
festivals.blurb: Garba circles in Gujarat. Pandals tower over Kolkata. Mysore Palace lights all hundred thousand bulbs.

festivals.name: Pongal
festivals.subtitle: Tamil harvest festival
festivals.blurb: Earthen pots bubble over with new rice. Kolams chalked at every threshold. Cattle painted and crowned.

festivals.name: Rath Yatra
festivals.subtitle: Chariot of Jagannath
festivals.blurb: Three immense wooden chariots roll through Puri pulled by tens of thousands of devotees.

festivals.name: Kumbh Mela
festivals.subtitle: Great pilgrim gathering
festivals.blurb: Millions converge at the sangam. Sadhus in saffron, ash-smeared akharas, ritual baths at dawn.

festivals.name: Republic Day
festivals.subtitle: 26 January
festivals.blurb: Tricolor flying high. Parades down Rajpath. India Gate floodlit.
